title: Pertamina Expands Cilacap Biorefinery to Boost SAF Production from UCO
content: Pertamina has officially launched the second phase of the Cilacap Biorefinery project, designed to significantly scale up the production of Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) using Used Cooking Oil (UCO) as feedstock. The expansion aims to increase daily production capacity from 27 kiloliters to 887 kiloliters by 2029. Aligned with the government's energy self-sufficiency goals, the project is expected to reduce carbon emissions by 600,000 tons annually and contribute up to Rp199 trillion to Indonesia's GDP. By integrating local waste banks for UCO collection, the initiative supports a circular economy and is projected to create around 5,900 jobs. This strategic development underscores Pertamina's commitment to the Net Zero Emission 2060 target and reducing dependence on fossil-based aviation fuel.
author: Analysts Account
